非常精彩的情节，扣人心弦，起伏跌宕，太好看了！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1671596745,"group_id":"7163106905705942054","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"书海沉浮三十载，一朝冲霄为星辰","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5fbqXC/jU2a5NB05I47UFwM6lMj5EKHiDSiE/OYEsOR","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3848731850710655","user_name":"在天星"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3848731850710655","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7163106905705942054","book_info":{"abstract":"【乡村+神医+种田+致富】
白泉村依山傍水，山美水好。
偏偏穷山沟子的男人们都外出打工去了。
剩下的不是懒就是坏，还有一个大傻子——李大柱。
机缘巧合之下，傻不拉几的李大柱被怪蛇咬了，又吞了火蟾。
整个人顿时清醒了过来，非但如此，还意外获得古籍。
曾经活的犹如猪狗一般的二傻子，如今，立志要活出个人样！
《武经》打恶霸，曾经欺负过我的人，一个都不能放过。
《农经》来种地，七山二水一分田的穷山沟，变成聚宝盆。
《医经》治百病，村民挨个上门，名声传开，总裁、明星、网红纷至沓来。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bef67b525469eb2abd4e0bb99a0241ea","author":"李念执","author_id":"","book_id":"7163106905705942054","book_name":"村里","book_short_name":"我的傻哥不简单","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7163106977714078222","read_count":"12844","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3107638"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"1512","tags":"都市种田,都市,乡村,多女主,无脑爽","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/df2268f6ea8cfc32e9dba9f3f924b1b2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779390406&x-signature=VGwhdA3CSiQUKUpWkp1Zqoa%2F6ug%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"6528521522","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"961446"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230306463CC0BA779EB4CEDF4A35"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":164,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":85028},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_d
